nasb.text: The nakedness of your son’s daughter or your daughter’s daughter, their nakedness you shall not uncover; for their nakedness is yours.

esv.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your son’s daughter or of your daughter’s daughter, for their nakedness is your own nakedness.

cnv.text: 你的孫女，或是你的外孫女的下體，你都不可揭露，因為她們的下體就是你自己的下體。

ccb.text: 不可与孙女或外孙女乱伦，那会自取羞辱。
